prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Hallmark Possession Event
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: casserole dish, boat key, ceramic owl

Cast:
- Rachel Dane | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.43 | space=marina tackle room described as seasonal materials | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; once left town without explaining why
- Cole Hale | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=hardware store owner | threat_aura=0.22 | space=church basement described as retreat supplies | secrets=covered for someone out of shame; ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Luke Sutton | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.58 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Daniel Hawthorne | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.55 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased; inherited documents she should have burned
- Wyatt Winterson | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=grief counselor | threat_aura=0.89 | space=church basement described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
- Brooke Dane | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.48 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Elias Winterson | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Luke Winterson | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Cole Hale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Rachel Dane says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Cole?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Elias. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Rachel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Daniel."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
